s: In 2020, Ian Anderson suited up for ATL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 1.950, WHIP 1.080, SO 41, WAR 1.100.
In 2021, Ian Anderson suited up for ATL as a two_way. Key numbers: AVG 0.054, OPS 0.160, HR 0, RBI 0, WAR 1.600.
In 2022, Ian Anderson suited up for ATL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.000, WHIP 1.510, SO 97, WAR 0.900.
Changed teams after the previous season (ATL -> LAA).
In 2025, Ian Anderson suited up for LAA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 11.570, WHIP 2.570, SO 8, WAR -0.100. Notable context: Joined LAA.
